# 16 MB partition layout: two OTA app sl: # filesystem partition for the config web assets and the Natural Earth basemap.
# The filesystem partition is LittleFS-formatted but MUST be named `spiffs`:
# the Arduino LittleFS driver looks the partition up by label and defaults to
# "spiffs" (see LittleFS.begin's partitionLabel arg). Naming it otherwise
# makes the mount fail at boot with esp_littlefs "partition could not be found".
